This mode lets you experience an adventure in Central Town,
located at the heart of the Digital World of Iliad.

This mode is available once you have completed the
Digimon Story: The Time Stranger Demo.

You can now play "Central Town - Adventure Trial" by
selecting it from the title screen.

Enjoy the unique features offered by the retail version
of the game, including collecting, raising, and battling
Digimon, as well as exploring the Digital World.

This mode lets you experience an adventure in Central Town, 
located in the middle of the Digital World of Iliad, as well as 
collect, raise and battle Digimon and explore the Digital World.

{fc9This mode has no save function and the data cannot be imported into the retail version.}

imported into the retail version of the game with your
"Central Town - Adventure Trial" save data.

Please save your data to another slot, or if there are
no free slots available, try deleting other data in order
to free up space.

This concludes the demo version.

Note: You can import your demo version save data
into the retail version of the game.
